target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building shows complete loss of roof and facade; structural collapse evident with debris field; no visible load-bearing elements intact; exceeds 75% area damaged per doctrinal definition.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed structural collapse and debris field. The scene depicts a street with a single intact vehicle parked before a heavily damaged, multi-story building with collapsed floors and exposed interiors. The functional impact is likely severe, with the building rendered uninhabitable and the street obstructed by rubble, indicating a loss of infrastructure and mobility.
